metadata.methodology: train_count is the pass-through distinct train-code count after upstream date/service filtering; pairs is train_count / 2.0 unless upstream data overrides it.
license_notes: Map tiles are attributed in the web UI.
OSM-derived geometry should retain OpenStreetMap ODbL attribution.
